full_text_rationale: Full text describes HxAgent using short-term memory plus long-term experience from correct and incorrect action sequences, with a training/evaluation phase and empirical web-test generation evaluation.
extractor_notes: Fresh search architecture extraction batch 007; controlled-comparison and quality status remain pending aggregate recomputation.
autores: Duy Cao, Phu Nguyen, Vy Le, Tien N. Nguyen, Vu Nguyen
titulo: Toward Generation of Test Cases from Task Descriptions via History-aware Planning
formato_armazenamento: HxAgent maintains short-term sequence-action memory as JSON/text state-action traces and long-term experience containing correct and incorrect action sequences selected from training for later evaluation prompts.
framework_agente: HxAgent history-aware planning agent for web test generation
llm_utilizado: GPT-4o; baseline comparisons include PaLM and other prior systems
benchmarks_utilizados: MiniWoB++ shared tasks, 125 challenging MiniWoB++ task instances, and 350 real-world web-application task instances
metricas_desempenho: Exact-Match accuracy, Prefix-Match accuracy, correct runs, ablation accuracy, prompt/output token consumption
baseline_comparado: WebGUM, RCI, Synapse, Li et al. staged LLM baseline with GPT-4o, and ablations without experience, without sequence-action memory, and without iterative planning
tokens_entrada_por_tarefa: Average 800,000 prompt tokens per task/application across training and evaluation phases.
tokens_saida_por_tarefa: Average 22,000 output tokens per task/application across training and evaluation phases.
tamanho_memoria_ao_longo_tempo: Experience starts empty during training, is updated from correct and incorrect sequences, and the selected optimal experience is fixed for evaluation; short-term memory records the action trace within each episode.
custo_por_tarefa: No monetary cost reported; average token consumption is 800,000 prompt tokens and 22,000 output tokens.
resultado_principal: HxAgent reaches 97% Exact-Match and 99% Prefix-Match on MiniWoB++, 82% Exact-Match on 125 challenging MiniWoB++ task instances, and 87% Exact-Match / 93% Prefix-Match on 350 real-world web-application task instances.
desempenho_vs_baseline: On challenging MiniWoB++ tasks, HxAgent averages 82% Exact-Match versus 10% for Li et al. (GPT-4o). On real-world applications it averages 87% Exact-Match versus 28% and 93% Prefix-Match versus 34%. Removing experience drops Exact-Match from 97% to 88%; removing both SAM and experience drops it to 47%.
custo_vs_baseline: NR as direct baseline cost; token consumption is reported but not compared against baseline token use.
limitacoes: Long-term experience is represented simply as correct/incorrect examples; date pickers, animations, pop-ups, modals, loading screens, and dynamic web elements remain limitations; token use is high.
ameacas_validade: MiniWoB++ and selected real-world web tasks may not generalize to all web applications; baseline replication, task-instance selection, and GPT-4o prompting affect validity.
